purpose: Propose attended read-only DevHub observation targets from synthetic post-decision smoke replay rows and official guidance placeholders only.

input_rows.observation_signal: Synthetic replay indicates agents need a read-only permit status surface shape before guarded response promotion.
Synthetic replay indicates agents need a redacted correction notice review target without attachment capture.

official_guidance_placeholders.expected_guidance_scope: Account-scoped DevHub services and read-only status review references.
Manual account attendance prerequisites for online permitting services.

observation_targets.target_surface: DevHub permit or request status summary
observation_targets.objective: Record fixture-only labels for navigation landmarks, status regions, and non-sensitive message categories using synthetic placeholders.

observation_targets.target_surface: DevHub correction or checksheet message list
observation_targets.objective: Record fixture-only synthetic message categories, empty-state labels, and manual handoff triggers without viewing or retaining attachments.

authorization_prerequisites.requirement: A human operator must attend any future observation in a user-owned account and complete all access prompts manually.
The operator must confirm the session is limited to read-only review and stop before any editable, upload, payment, scheduling, certification, cancellation, or submission control.

redaction_expectations.expectation: Replace names, addresses, account identifiers, permit identifiers, email addresses, phone numbers, and page values with typed synthetic placeholders.
Capture only synthetic record identifier classes such as synthetic_permit_number_label and synthetic_status_label.
Do not retain file names, document titles, thumbnails, links, downloaded files, or attachment metadata from an account-scoped page.

unsupported_manual_handoff_reminders.reminder: Manual handoff is required if the future attended observation reaches any form fill, upload, payment, scheduling, certification, cancellation, or submission control.
Manual handoff is required for sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, account creation, password recovery, or access troubleshooting.

rollback_notes.note: Rollback removes this seed packet and fixture-only tests only; it does not require cleanup of DevHub artifacts because none are created.

reviewer_routing.routing_reason: Review proposed read-only surface labels and authorization prerequisites before any future attended observation.
Confirm unsupported or consequential controls remain handoff-only and outside fixture capture.

prohibited_live_actions: Do not open DevHub for this seed packet.
Do not log in or create session state for this seed packet.
Do not store auth files, session files, screenshots, traces, HAR files, raw crawl output, downloads, or private values.
Do not fill forms or perform official actions.
